gallery.contactLink: Looking for something similar? Write to us

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: The most common questions before requesting your quote.

items.q: What kind of work do you do?
items.a: Repairs, maintenance, installations and improvements across different areas of the home: carpentry, plumbing, painting, electrical work, masonry and more.

items.q: Do you handle small fixes or only big projects?
items.a: Both. We're ready for a quick fix as well as a full home improvement.

items.q: Are the photos and videos real jobs?
items.a: Yes. Some spots are still reserved for material; as they're published, you'll see real photos and videos of finished jobs for each area.

items.q: What details do I need to request a quote?
items.a: Your name, phone, email, the service you need and a short description of the problem or improvement you're after. That's all it takes to get started.

items.q: Why don't I see prices on the page?
items.a: Because every job is different. The price is agreed with you based on what you need, and asking costs nothing and commits you to nothing.

cta.title: Request your quote, no obligation
cta.description: Tell us what service you need and describe the problem or the improvement. We'll get back to you to coordinate the visit by WhatsApp, call or email.
cta.successText: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible to coordinate the visit.
cta.name: Name
cta.descriptionLabel: Tell us the problem or the improvement
cta.error: The message couldn't be sent. Try again or write to us on WhatsApp.
cta.note: Asking costs nothing and commits you to nothing.
